title: Create Dynamic Secret (PostgreSQL) — Request Example
description: Create a dynamic secret that generates ephemeral PostgreSQL credentials on demand. Each lease produces a unique username/password pair that is automatically revoked after the TTL expires.

inputs.creationStatement: CREATE ROLE "{{username}}" WITH LOGIN PASSWORD '{{password}}' VALID UNTIL '{{expiration}}'; GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO "{{username}}";
inputs.revocationStatement: REVOKE ALL PRIVILEGES ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public FROM "{{username}}"; DROP ROLE IF EXISTS "{{username}}";
